mainDressCode.title: Attire Guide
mainDressCode.description: WE WOULD LOVE TO SEE YOU IN YOUR FORMAL ATTIRE THAT COMPLEMENTS OUR GARDEN WEDDING COLOR PALETTE

sections.title: Principal Sponsors
sections.description: For Ninongs: Formal suit in burnt orange or brown tones. For Ninangs: Elegant long gown in burnt orange or brown.

sections.title: Guests
sections.shortDescription: Ladies: Elegant attire in terracotta, burnt orange, sage green, beige, or garden green.
sections.description: Ladies: We invite you to wear elegant attire in our garden wedding colors - terracotta, burnt orange, sage green, beige, or garden green. Gentlemen: Please wear a formal or semi-formal suit with a necktie or bowtie in complementary tones from our color palette.
